tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema migration — reviewed columns + extended status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add reviewed_at, reviewed_by, email_markdown columns to reconciliation_items and widen status check to include 'reviewed'. Regenerate Supabase types.

```json:metadata
{"files":["supabase/migrations/20260520000000_review_flow.sql","src/lib/db/database.types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm db:reset && pnpm db:types && pnpm check","acceptanceCriteria":["Migration applies cleanly","status check includes 'reviewed'","Generated types reflect new columns"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extend Discrepancy + DecisionLogEntry types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add suggested_rationale, final_rationale, flag_state to DiscrepancyBase; extend DecisionLogEntry.action union.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/reconcile/types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm check","acceptanceCriteria":["DiscrepancyBase has 3 new fields","action union extended","existing actions retained"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Templated rationales + flag defaults in rules pre-pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** rules.ts uses withReviewDefaults helper so every rule-emitted finding carries templated suggested_rationale, final_rationale, and flag_state='exclude'.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/reconcile/rules.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm check && pnpm lint","acceptanceCriteria":["all rule findings have 3 new fields","cosmetic template","auto_resolved template"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: LLM seam — elicit suggested_rationale
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prompt + zod schema in src/lib/reconcile/ emit a carrier-facing suggested_rationale per finding. Fallback stub emits a rationale string but leaves final_rationale/flag_state for Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/reconcile/prompts.ts","src/lib/reconcile/llm.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm check","acceptanceCriteria":["prompt rule 6 added","zod requires suggested_rationale","fallback emits rationale"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Reconcile post-process — flag + rationale defaults
tasks.description:
**Goal:** index.ts runs every finding through withDefaults(d): flag_state per tier, final_rationale = suggested_rationale, stable id.

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/reconcile/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"pnpm check && pnpm build","acceptanceCriteria":["flag_state per tier","final_rationale populated","stable id","e2e reconcile writes all 3"]}
```
